nasb.text: Esther said, “If it pleases the king, may the king and Haman come this day to the banquet that I have prepared for him.”

esv.text: And Esther said, “If it please the king, let the king and Haman come today to a feast that I have prepared for the king.”

cnv.text: 以斯帖回答：“王若是歡喜，就請王今天帶著哈曼來赴我為王預備的筵席。”

ccb.text: 以斯帖回答说：“王若愿意，就请王今天带哈曼来赴我预备的宴席。”
